get_referencers takes package_name (Name) and reference_options (AssetRegistryDependencyOptions), returns Array[Name]
get_dependencies takes package_name (Name) and dependency_options (AssetRegistryDependencyOptions), returns Array[Name]
get_assets_by_class takes class_path_name (TopLevelAssetPath), returns Array[AssetData]
get_assets takes filter (ARFilter), returns Array[AssetData]
PaperTileMap is composed of tile layers, materials, import data, and projection/collision settings
SwapAudioOutputResult uses SwapAudioOutputDeviceResultState for result field
ResponseChannel uses CollisionResponseType for response field
RigUnit_HierarchyAddNull uses RigElementKey for parent/item, ControlRigExecuteContext for execution, Transform for initial transform, and RigVMTransformSpace for space definition
UrbanStaticMeshAssetUserData uses Map[SoftObjectPath, LinearColor] and Map[SoftObjectPath, str] for material properties
ComputeKernelSource depends on multiple compute-related types for kernel compilation
UVMapSettings uses Vector for position/scale/size, Vector2D for uv_tile, and Rotator for rotation
AnimGraphNode_Fabrik uses multiple types for animation graph functionality
RigUnit_ToSwingAndTwist uses Quat for input/swing/twist and Vector for twist_axis
AnimLinkableElement uses AnimLinkMethod for linking and AnimSequenceBase for sequence reference
SlatePostSettings uses type(Class) for post_processor_class field
